profile.name: Jaskirat Singh
profile.title: UI/UX Designer
profile.tagline: Wiring interfaces in the static. First-year designer / signal-hunter.
profile.bio: A first-year design student building in the gap between glitch and clarity. I like interfaces that hum, type that flickers on purpose, and the colour of monitors at 3 a.m.
profile.personalTouch: Off the grid I make playlists with too much synthwave, sketch typography in 0.1mm pen, and rebuild keyboards I don't need. Vibes: late nights, neon, slow code.
profile.goals: Build a portfolio with shipped, polished work; learn motion design and shaders properly; intern at a studio that takes craft seriously.
